content:
# shadcn/ui - Overview

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: modern SaaS, AI app, dashboard, developer tool, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ui.shadcn.com/

Visual traits:
- clean
- composable
- neutral
- modern
- utility-first

Use when:
- modern SaaS
- AI app
- dashboard
- developer tool
- settings page

Avoid when:
- highly branded editorial site
- native mobile app
- luxury visual campaign

AI summary: Use shadcn/ui-style composition for modern React/Tailwind web apps: accessible primitives, clean neutral surfaces, consistent rhythm, and explicit component states.

# shadcn/ui - Layout Rules

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: modern SaaS, AI app, dashboard, developer tool, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ui.shadcn.com/

- Compose small accessible primitives into product-specific components.
- Use restrained surfaces, borders, and typography before adding strong color.
- Keep spacing and component rhythm consistent across the page.

AI summary: Use shadcn/ui-style composition for modern React/Tailwind web apps: accessible primitives, clean neutral surfaces, consistent rhythm, and explicit component states.

# shadcn/ui - Component Patterns

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: modern SaaS, AI app, dashboard, developer tool, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ui.shadcn.com/

- button
- dialog
- dropdown
- command menu
- card
- form
- table
- toast

AI summary: Use shadcn/ui-style composition for modern React/Tailwind web apps: accessible primitives, clean neutral surfaces, consistent rhythm, and explicit component states.

# shadcn/ui - Interaction States

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: modern SaaS, AI app, dashboard, developer tool, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ui.shadcn.com/

- hover
- focus
- open
- disabled
- loading
- validation error

AI summary: Use shadcn/ui-style composition for modern React/Tailwind web apps: accessible primitives, clean neutral surfaces, consistent rhythm, and explicit component states.

# shadcn/ui - Accessibility Notes

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: modern SaaS, AI app, dashboard, developer tool, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ui.shadcn.com/

- Prefer accessible primitives for dialogs, menus, popovers, and forms.
- Preserve keyboard and focus behavior when restyling.

AI summary: Use shadcn/ui-style composition for modern React/Tailwind web apps: accessible primitives, clean neutral surfaces, consistent rhythm, and explicit component states.

# shadcn/ui - Implementation Hints

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: modern SaaS, AI app, dashboard, developer tool, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ui.shadcn.com/

- Use when generating React/Tailwind interfaces that need modern product polish.
- Good default for AI tools, internal tools, and fast SaaS prototypes.
- Avoid making every page look like the same generic template; add product-specific visual direction.

AI summary: Use shadcn/ui-style composition for modern React/Tailwind web apps: accessible primitives, clean neutral surfaces, consistent rhythm, and explicit component states.
